scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,yellow "npm run dev --prefix zentrade-app" "cd zentrade-backend && source venv/bin/activate && uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000"
scripts.start: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,yellow "npm run dev --prefix zentrade-app" "cd zentrade-backend && source venv/bin/activate && uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000"
